fields.label: Email
Name
Contact Number
What type of laboratory are you?
If 'Other' for Laboratory Type, please specify:
Type of Sample Extraction
What sample type was used?
If 'Blood' sample type, please specify type (e.g., Plasma, Serum, Whole Blood):
Was the extraction performed strictly according to provided protocol?
How long after collection was the sample processed?
What specific result issue did you observe? (Select all that apply)
options: No amplification curve or visible (Flat line)
Late CT values (Significantly higher than expected)
Abnormal curve shape (e.g., lagged, double peak)
Unexpected amplification in the Negative Control (NC)
Specific error message displayed on the device (Please detail below)

fields.label: How consistent is this problem across samples?
What is the date and time of the run where the issue occurred?
Were any amplification curves visible for the target (FAM channel)?
Is the RFU (Relative Fluorescence Units) significantly lower than your lab's standard baseline?
Please select the primary category of the technical issue you observed.
options: A: Machine/Device Failure (e.g., error codes, heating cooling failure, power issues)
B: Kit/Reagent Issue (e.g., failed controls, unexpected results, storage-expiry concerns)
C: Assay/Protocol Issue (e.g., extraction failure, internal control failure, low efficiency)
D: Environmental Conditions/External Factor (e.g., power cut, ambient temperature fluctuation)

fields.label: What is the severity of the problem you are experiencing? (Helps us prioritize)
options: P1: Critical - Device/System is completely non-operational (System Down/Total Failure)
P2: High - System is partially working or output is unreliable/inaccurate (Major impact on operations)
P3: Medium - Minor intermittent issues or general feedback (Minimal impact on operations)

fields.label: What is the current operational status of the device?
Did any power interruption occur immediately before or during the run?
If applicable: what is the Efficiency from the observed parameters of the standard curve?
If applicable: what is the R² value from the observed parameters of the standard curve?
If applicable: what is the slope from the observed parameters of the standard curve?
Did Internal Controls amplify correctly on all the samples?
Where is the CT value of the Internal Controls?
Positive Control: Did you run a positive control?
Positive Control: If Yes, did the positive control amplify correctly?
Positive Control: Did the positive control amplify correctly as?
Negative Control: Did you run a negative control?
Negative Control: If Yes, did the negative control show any amplification?
Negative Control: Did the negative control show any amplification in any of the samples?
What PCR device was used?
Equipment - Device Name (if selected 'Other' above, or if specific extraction system)
Model Number
Serial Number
Were the reagents stored according to instructions (e.g., proper temperature)?
Are the reagents within their expiry date?
Were any changes made to the standard protocol for this run?
Detailed Description of the Issue, Steps Already Taken to Troubleshoot, and Device Error Messages, Any Feedback (if applicable)
Upload Amplification Plot, Result Screen, or Device Error Message (REQUIRED for technical review)
